_comment: Games your sportsbook VOIDED / refunded (no action) - listed here so grading never books them as a W or L, and un-books them if already graded. Add an object to "voids": {"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "matchup": "Away Team @ Home Team"} (matchup exactly as the board shows it, full team names). A {"game_pk": 123456} also works. Runs on the next grade/board build.
